episodes.title: Aftermath
episodes.synopsis: Cate Randa travels to Tokyo after her father's death and discovers he had a secret life — including a half-brother she never knew.

episodes.title: Departure
episodes.synopsis: 1950s: Lee Shaw encounters Godzilla for the first time. Present: Cate and Kentaro join forces with a mysterious woman named May.

episodes.title: Terramoto
episodes.synopsis: The group follows Bill's trail to Kazakhstan. Flashbacks reveal the founding of Monarch.

episodes.title: Parallels and Interiors
episodes.synopsis: May's true identity is revealed. Lee Shaw's past comes back. A Titan appears in the Alaskan wilderness.

episodes.title: The Way Out
episodes.synopsis: A desperate escape from a Hollow Earth cave system. Shaw reveals what Monarch is truly hiding.

episodes.title: Terrifying Miracles
episodes.synopsis: The team witnesses something impossible. Shaw's wartime secret is revealed in full.

episodes.title: Will the Real May Please Stand Up
episodes.synopsis: May confronts her past with Apex — a connection to Mechagodzilla's development.

episodes.title: Gothic Grotto
episodes.synopsis: Stranded underground. The group fights to survive as a Titan nests nearby.

episodes.title: Axis Mundi
episodes.synopsis: The Hollow Earth entrance is discovered. Shaw makes a sacrifice. Time runs out.

episodes.title: Beyond Logic
episodes.synopsis: Season finale. The Randa siblings must make an impossible choice about what Monarch becomes.

episodes.title: Terzetto
episodes.synopsis: Engineer Yun and researcher Mei independently investigate a mysterious radio signal. A strange red powder appears.

episodes.title: Symbloom
episodes.synopsis: The red dust spreads. A massive flock of Rodan descends on Nigashio City. Yun's robot B.B. proves unexpectedly useful.

episodes.title: Overlapping Chords
episodes.synopsis: Mei's research points to a shared signal connecting all Titan appearances. A sea serpent Manda emerges.

episodes.title: Shadowed and Battered
episodes.synopsis: Anguirus appears. Yun and B.B. attempt to track its origin. The Archetype signal intensifies.

episodes.title: Forms and Functions
episodes.synopsis: Mei discovers the Singular Point theory — a mathematical inevitability. Monsters evolve faster than Monarch can classify.

episodes.title: Theorems of the Irrational
episodes.synopsis: A juvenile Godzilla is sighted in the ocean. Mei realises the connection between all phenomena.

episodes.title: Habitual Habitat
episodes.synopsis: Godzilla evolves from aquatic to amphibious form. The red dust accelerates.

episodes.title: All For One
episodes.synopsis: Yun and Mei's paths finally converge. Godzilla's final form begins to emerge.

episodes.title: Down in Flames
episodes.synopsis: Godzilla Ultima rampages through Japan. Conventional weapons useless. Mei calculates a solution.

episodes.title: A Great Leap
episodes.synopsis: The plan to create a counter-Archetype weapon is put into motion. Time is fracturing.

episodes.title: Intersection
episodes.synopsis: Salunga breaks free. Godzilla Ultima reaches critical mass. Mei enacts the Singular Point solution.

episodes.title: Reincarnation
episodes.synopsis: The final counter-measure is deployed. The Singular Point collapses. What remains of Japan?

episodes.title: The Beginning
episodes.synopsis: Epilogue. The world changed. Yun and Mei look toward a future permanently altered by Titan emergence.

episodes.title: Rebirth of Mothra (1996)
episodes.synopsis: A new Mothra — Leo — must battle the ancient evil Desghidorah to save the Earth. The Elias fairies must aid him.

episodes.title: Rebirth of Mothra II (1997)
episodes.synopsis: Leo battles Dagahra, a sea monster who pollutes the ocean with toxic Barem starfish. Ancient civilisation mystery unfolds.

episodes.title: Rebirth of Mothra III (1998)
episodes.synopsis: Leo travels back in time to defeat a younger King Ghidorah. The most epic film in the trilogy.
